descriptionTemplate: {Frenzied Slash} increases Base DMG by 33%. While in Depressed Persona, the Arithmetica Cost of corresponding Cards is reduced by an additional 1; while in Manic Persona, the number of hits is increased by an additional 1.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate:
Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times.
Depressed Persona: Reduce the Arithmetica Cost of the highest-cost card in hand by 2 and gain Temporary {Retain}. Manic Persona: Deal 3 additional instances of DMG.

descriptionTemplate: At turn end, "24" obtains 10 Aliemus. Each time "24" releases Exalt, the Aliemus obtained from this effect in battle increases by 1.
{Symbiotic Aberration} generates 2 more Aliemus. In Depressed state, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn; in Manic state, inflict {Vulnerable} on all enemies for 1 turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate:
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. "24" obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
Depressed Persona: Other Awakeners also obtain the same amount of Aliemus, and all enemies gain {Weakness} for 1 turn. Manic Persona: Triple the Aliemus gained, and all enemies gain {Vulnerable} for 1 turn.

descriptionTemplate: {Strike} and {Defense} triggers 10% {Poison} on all enemies.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Agrippa obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Trigger [Arg3]% {Poison} on all enemies.
Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Agrippa obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Trigger [Arg3]% of {Poison} on all enemies.

descriptionTemplate: {Colorless Spiral} increases Base DMG by 50%, and playing it grants {Embryo Fusion} +20%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and an equal amount of {Poison}. {Embryo Fusion} +[Blood:Arg2]%. Whenever {Devour} is triggered, move {Colorless Spiral} from the Discard Pile to your hand.

descriptionTemplate: {Reluctant Alms} reduces the Arithmetica Cost of the highest-cost Card in hand by 1 for this turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Current {Embryo Fusion} is doubled. Reduce the Arithmetica Cost of the card with the highest Arithmetica Cost in your hand by 1 for this turn.

descriptionTemplate: {Rouse} {Stagnant Curse} is enhanced: Exalt {Eye of Eternity} causes the next {Defense} played by Aigis to trigger 3 times.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Aigis obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: After Aigis plays a card, inflict [Arg2] turns of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Exalt {Eye of Eternity} causes the next Aigis's {Defense} to take effect 3 times.

descriptionTemplate: Whenever you {Devour}, put {A Small Wish} from the Discard Pile into hand and set its Arithmetica Cost to 0.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and inflict [Arg2] turns of {Vulnerable}. {Embryo Fusion} +[Arg3]%. When {Devour} is triggered, move {A Small Wish} from the Discard Pile to your hand and reduce its Arithmetica Cost to 0.

descriptionTemplate: For each {Vulnerable} stack on the target, the Final DMG of {Decomposition} increases by 5%, up to 500%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, enjoys a 2x {STR} bonus. If the target is {Vulnerable}, refund the Arithmetica used for this card and draw 1 card. For each stack of {Vulnerable} on the target, increase the Final DMG of {Decomposition} by [Arg2]%, up to 500%.

descriptionTemplate: For each stack of {Vulnerable} state on the target of {Strike}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by 5%, up to 30%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. For each stack of {Vulnerable}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[Arg3]%, up to [Arg4]%. Aigis obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: {Endless Justice} grants Alva a 50% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Discard all State Cards and Symptom Cards from your Hand, and draw a number of Cards equal to the number discarded +1. {Vulnerable} all enemies for 1 turn. Alva gains 50% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.

descriptionTemplate: {Endless Justice} Draw quantity +1.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Discard all State Cards and Symptom Cards from your hand, and draw a number of Cards equal to the quantity discarded + 1. {Vulnerable} All enemies for 1 Turn.

descriptionTemplate: {Combat Stance} is considered {Defense}.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. If in hand at turn end, generate Shield 1 more time next time it is played. Dispel all Awakeners' {Sealed} states. Considered as {Defense}.

descriptionTemplate: {Power of Friendship} allows you to draw 1 additional card.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: {Tentacle DMG} +[TentaclePower:Arg1]. Discard all cards in hand, then draw the same amount +1 cards. Shuffle 1 {Gland Division} into the Discard Pile.

descriptionTemplate: {Defense} draws 1 card. Every 3 turns, add 1 {Gland Division} with {Exhaust} and {Fleeting}.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield, draw 1 Card. Aurita obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: {Gland Division} and {Clamorous Ocean} increase Base DMG by 100%, dealing {Pierce DMG}.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG}. Consume up to 10 {Gland Division} cards from the Draw Pile and Discard Pile, each causing an additional instance of DMG. Place 2 {Gland Division} cards into hand. Increase the DMG caused by Aurita in this battle by [Arg2] points.
Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG}. Shuffle [Arg2] copies of {Gland Division} into the Discard Pile. {Aftershock}: Obtain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: {Rouse} {Self-Proliferation} is enhanced: Aurita's {Strike} deals {Pierce DMG} and triggers 2 additional instances of DMG.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Aurita obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle, and add 2 {Gland Division} into hand. When Aurita deals DMG, have [Arg2] Tentacles attack once. Aurita's {Strike} deals {Pierce DMG} and attack +2 times.

descriptionTemplate: {Shattered Halberd} grants [Arg1] Aliemus. (effect scales with {Shattered Halberd} skill level)

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain an equal amount of {Counter} with a 50% {Tentacle DMG} bonus. Obtain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: Heal HP equal to 7.5% of CON at turn end.
{Protective Scales} Shield Generation 20% and gains {Retain}.
{Telekinesis} gains {Aftershock}: Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Draw Pile.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Treated as {Strike}. Choose any 1 card from {Ultra Space} and add it to your hand, reducing its Arithmetica Cost by 2. Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times, and gain [Power:Arg3] Temporary {STR}. {Aftershock}: Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Draw Pile.

descriptionTemplate: For every card {Poof!} shuffled in, the Sorcerer gains 3 Aliemus.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. Discard Symptom and State Cards from your hand, shuffle the remaining cards in your hand into the Draw Pile, then draw a number of cards equal to the quantity discarded and shuffled, gaining [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus per card drawn. {Leap}: Refund the Arithmetica Cost of '{Poof!}'.

descriptionTemplate: {Magic Carnival} draws an additional card. Drawing a Symptom or State card also deals 1 instance of DMG to a random enemy.

descriptionTemplate: At the start of the battle, place 1 {Onyx Plume} into hand.
For every 3 {Onyx Plume} you play, obtain 1 Arithmetica and increase Castor's Final DMG by 10% in this battle.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] DMG and draw [Arg1] cards. For every 3 {Onyx Plume} played, obtain 1 Arithmetica and increase Castor's Final DMG by 10% in this battle. {Retain}: Obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield. {Exhaust}.

descriptionTemplate: For every {Onyx Plume} in hand, playing {Stygian Wings} grants 5 Aliemus. For every {Onyx Plume} you play, the Arithmetica Cost of {Umbral Flight} is reduced by 1 this turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times, increase other allies' Temporary Crit. DMG by [Arg5]% of Castor's Crit. DMG. For every {Onyx Plume} played this turn, Arithmetica Cost -1. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile and gain [Block:Arg4] Shield.

Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn. For every {Onyx Plume} in hand, obtain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile, obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield.

descriptionTemplate: {Tintless Dream} retains for each turn; the next time it is played, it will restore an additional amount of HP equal to [Arg1]% of CON (the effect increases with the level of {Tintless Dream}).

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Heal [Heal:Arg1] HP. Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and dispel Hand {Stagnation} state. For every {Retain} 1 turn, heal an additional [Arg3] HP on the next play. Trigger 1 Tentacle to attack the enemy, dealing [Arg4]% {Tentacle DMG}.

descriptionTemplate: {Undying Bird of Paradise} triggers {Revival}, and all Awakeners obtain 25 Aliemus and can apply the {Revival} effect again after an interval of 6 turns.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Dispels own {Blighten} state, restores [Heal:Arg1] HP and gains 1 Arithmetica. Revives upon receiving lethal DMG during this battle, restores [Arg2]% HP and grants all Awakeners [Energy:Arg4] Aliemus. This revive Effect can only be triggered again after 6 turns.
Revives upon receiving lethal DMG during this battle, restores [Arg2]% HP and grants all Awakeners [Energy:Arg4] Aliemus. This revive Effect can only be triggered again after 6 turns.

descriptionTemplate: {Everlasting Phantasm} is {Retained}, and the healing effect is increased by 20%.
Obtain 5 stacks of {Symbiosis} when the battle begins. Base DMG of {Lifeform Reconstruction} increases by 20%.

{Lifeform Reconstruction} additionally gains 200% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen as Keyflare. For each stack of {Symbiosis} removed, Clementine's Base DMG increases by 3%. At the end of each battle, Clementine's Base DMG increases by 25%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Remove all {Symbiosis} from self, and choose to convert them into {Psychic Trauma} or {Phobic Fixation} for all enemies, increasing Clementine's Base DMG by 3% for each stack removed. Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. Gain Keyflare equal to [Arg2]% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen.

descriptionTemplate: At turn end, obtain 2 stacks of {Symbiosis}. The stacking limit for {Symbiosis}, {Psychic Trauma}, and {Phobic Fixation} is increased to 15.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Under the erosion of the Hive, your fears are laid bare. For each stack, DMG dealt this turn reduces by 3%, stacking up to 15 stacks.
Under the erosion of the Hive, your fears are laid bare. For each stack, DMG taken this turn increases by 3%, stacking up to 15 stacks.

Her emotions, cognition, and everything else are eternally linked to the Hive Will. "Empathy" can be transformed into debuff effects by Clementine's Exalt {Lifeform Reconstruction}, stacking up to 15 stacks.

descriptionTemplate: {Strike} and {Defense} gain 5 Aliemus, and obtain {Aftershock}: the next Aliemus gained from playing a card is increased by 5, stacking up to 2 times.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Winkle obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. The DMG dealt enjoys a 25% {Counter} bonus.
Remove all enemy {Barrier} and deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, inflict 1 turn of {Weakness}. Obtain [Arg3] Keyflare. {Leap}: Instead obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Dealt DMG enjoys a 25% {Counter} bonus.

descriptionTemplate: {Psyche Reforged} grants Shield equal to [Arg1]% of DEF for each card discarded (the effect increases with the level of {Psyche Reforged}). Draw 1 card immediately if {Leap} is triggered.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield, discard all hands, for each card discarded, the Shield Generation +50% and gain [Block:Arg2] points of Delayed Shield. {Leap}: No longer discard cards and draw 2 cards, the Shield Generation increases by 100%.

descriptionTemplate: {Formless Shifting} increases Shield Generation and {Counter} by 25%. The selected Awakener can release Exalt twice this turn before entering cooldown.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Dispel self {Fragile} state and gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Obtain [Counterattack:Arg3] stacks of {Counter}. Choose 1 other Awakener to obtain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus and make that Awakener release 2 Exalt Bursts this turn before entering cooldown.

descriptionTemplate: {Bonesick Longing}: {Embryo Fusion} +15%. For every 1% of DMG Amplification that Xu, her Wheels of Destiny, and Covenants have, the {Embryo Fusion} gained from this effect +0.2%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies (guaranteed Crit) and trigger [Arg2]% {Poison}. {Embryo Fusion} +[Arg6]%. {Resonance 3}: {Embryo Fusion} +[Arg4]%.

descriptionTemplate: {Strike} and {Defense} gain {Resonance 3}: additionally gain 15 Aliemus.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Xu gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.{Resonance 3}: Additionally gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus.
Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Xu gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Resonance 3}: Additionally gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: Max {Spellbound} stacks increases from 5 to 10. {Mist-Bound Vow} doubles the {Resonance} effect for Xu's next Command Card.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: Temporarily reduce all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg1].] Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and inflict [Poison:Arg3] stacks of {Poison} on all enemies. Xu's next triggered {Resonance} effect is doubled. Choose: {Betroth} or {Enthrall}.

descriptionTemplate:
{Vortex! Shell!} additionally deals {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.5% Target's Max HP. Realm Mastery +50 after using {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!}.
For each point of Realm Mastery that Vortice, her WoDs, and Covenants have, {Vortex! Shell!} deals extra {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.005% Target's Max HP. Realm Mastery +0.5 after using {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!}.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Dispel {Burn} from all dards in hand. Deal DMG equal to [Arg7]% {Tentacle DMG} Bonus to all enemies, dealing 2x DMG to the enemy with the highest HP. Sacrifice up to 3 extra Permanent Tentacles, each increasing this Exalt's Crit. DMG by +50%. Gain [Arg6] Realm Mastery.
Deal [Arg4] + [Float:Arg3]% of target's Max HP as {Fixed DMG} to the enemy with the highest HP, {Tentacle DMG} +[TentaclePower:Arg2].

descriptionTemplate: Vortice's {Strike} and {Defense} increase the next Vortice Exalt's Crit. Rate by +10%, and reduce the next {Reload!} Arithmetica Cost by 1.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Vortice gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Vortice's next Exalt Crit. Rate +[Arg3]%, and reduce the next {Reload!} Arithmetica Cost by 1.
Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Vortice gains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Vortice's next Exalt Crit. Rate +[Arg3]%, and reduce the next {Reload!} Arithmetica Cost by 1.

descriptionTemplate: {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!} now deals 3x DMG to the enemy with the highest HP instead of 2x. For every 20 Aliemus spent, other Awakeners gain 1 Aliemus.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Dispel {Burn} from all Cards in hand. Deal DMG equal to [Arg7]% {Tentacle DMG} Bonus to all enemies, dealing 3x DMG to the enemy with the highest HP. Sacrifice up to 3 additional Permanent Tentacles, each increasing this Exalt's Crit. DMG by +50%. Gain [Arg6] Realm Mastery, and for every 20 Aliemus spent, other Awakeners gain 1 Aliemus.

descriptionTemplate: {Weaver} stack cap increases from 3 to 5, and {Singularity Prism} gained from {Infinite Threads} is doubled.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: The Fate {Weaver} draws her threads. Max 5 stacks, persist across battles, and can be consumed by Exalt to unleash {Pursuit}: {Infinite Threads}.

descriptionTemplate: Arachne's Exalt grants +25% Temporary DMG Amplification. For every point of Realm Mastery provided by Arachne and her equipped WoD & Covenant, the Temporary DMG Amplification additionally +0.25%.

{Rouse} {Puppet Stage Unveiled} is enhanced: After triggering {Annihilation}, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 50% {Final Verdict} to all enemies. The DMG Amplification and Shield gained from the next Exalt +50%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} is changed to: choose 1 Command Card from {Ultra Space}, take it out and make it trigger twice the next time it is played, and make the next played Command Card trigger {Dimension Shuttle}. After using {Annihilation}, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 50% {Final Verdict} to all enemies, and the DMG Amplification and Shield gained from the next Exalt +50%.

descriptionTemplate: {Eternal Loom} deals +50% {Final Verdict}. {Fate-Binding Web} gains {Prepare} and {Retain}.
